title: dracaena serrulata subsp. serrulata
intro: Dracaena serrulata subsp. serrulata, also known as the Serra dracaena or Serra dragon tree, is a species of plant in the Asparagaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Dracaena serrulata subsp. serrulata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by extracting its roots and leaves to create teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
